scripts.check:toolchain: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const node = process.versions.node; const npm = execSync('npm -v').toString().trim(); if (!/^22\./.test(node)) { console.error('Expected Node 22.x, found ' + node); process.exit(1); } if (!/^10\./.test(npm)) { console.error('Expected npm 10.x, found ' + npm); process.exit(1); } console.log('Toolchain OK: Node ' + node + ', npm ' + npm);"
